creator: engineering.atspotify.com

evidence.text: Our EwL framework redefines experimental success by shifting focus from a narrow win rate to the broader value of generating decision-informing insights. By classifying any valid experiment that detects a win, a regression, or a conclusive neutral result as a “learning,” we acknowledge that the primary value of experimentation comes from mitigating risk and understanding what doesn’t work. Our EwL rate of ~64% and win rate of ~12% clearly show there’s more to learn than just what wins. Our EwL metric is a strategic tool that helps us guide investment, manage testing capacity, improve experimentation practices, and evolve Confidence — fostering an innovative culture that l
